textByHash.48896bae34d4aec5c3f1c01b69119d53c710d346: Hi, what can I get you? We have a range of quality brews.
textByHash.5164783f2e4d2ac6703977738536dcfe324647c4: That'll be two gold coins please.
textByHash.226b993fb2e46e25e39e587e04f7bedd9fa5990a: There you go, that's two gold coins.
textByHash.881c66e169127fdefc9ef4a910eb0d74ca4adde4: If you want to see the action around here you should visit the famous Khazard fight arena. I've seen some grand battles in my time. Ogres, goblins, even dragons have fought there.
textByHash.a6b082bbf8bf28aa4911dbbd69d96536c39ba810: Although you have to feel sorry for some of the slaves sent in there.
textByHash.a02515541bafd3040c049c41cc76b204c6fe473a: That'll be five gold coins please.
textByHash.0df9c61640ccdc54f248e5515d39cb1abf9012c7: There you go, that's five gold coins. I suggest lying down before you drink it. That way you have less distance to collapse.
textByHash.5bb351ad548e653c80abe86451db10874a77d4a6: It's not my place to go giving out information to people I don't know.
textByHash.17e5832dcd681a4dccb6a35595d94887e1ed3324: Are you suggesting that I'm the kind of person that would besmirch my honour for a measly bribe?
textByHash.35ef5634bffa3e93632cc6dd673db8391e1fdd63: Because you'd be absolutely right! 100 coins will pay for the information you desire.
textByHash.e5e599997d4c680707a7b25a373671059d1d66d0: So oddly enough, she was in here not that long ago, but just before you arrived, one of the lads came in and spoke to her.
textByHash.17016b2f75950c5674d64a5dd0ad8e181269fdec: No idea, but she left in quite the hurry afterwards. Perhaps you'll be able to pick up her trail if you look around outside.
textByHash.691955955360ee6e28ddc0a6d177b08038db3a14: Fancy a drink before you go?
textByHash.89cd4051e64c4734621cea353ca87e09a6e037a8: Like I said, 100 coins will pay for the information you desire.
textByHash.fcad08d50d23cb7794975e7e67e1e67ebe899c3a: Like I told you, she left earlier in quite a hurry. Perhaps you'll be able to pick up her trail if you look around outside.
textByHash.c1a6fb7dac1545e83760c009c4ea042746528c6d: I might do. Why do you want to know?
textByHash.fbe9ab922bc45d328e8e74559e8d8550a1225b2d: Good for you, but that's not really got anything to do with me.
textByHash.03fb959cf9dcf7a95e8996a0a6b0c19794c86b93: I'm aware of him. Couldn't tell you anything about him though, even if I wanted to.
textByHash.88328819e53608a326498dcc372422ada891023e: He sometimes uses the launderer just to the north of here. Maybe you should try talking to him. Now, would you like a drink?
textByHash.f045eb7e93679fd1e8cfa0890e4cd775efa4d693: Not really, but if you want to see some action, keep an eye on the arena. I've seen some grand battles in my time. Ogres, goblins and even dragons have fought there.
textByHash.ccdfd087745733a5f62357c7c3b9b16b8facaeb8: Now, can I get you something?
